text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which race will Hokko Tarumae be taking on
after the February Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We learn the answer to that question during a TV
interview.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Really? You plan on running overseas?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yes, in the Middle East. I plan on competing in an
international G1 race in Dubai!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Will you be running as a representative of
the Umamusume of Japan?!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Not quite... I'm the tourism ambassador for
Tomakomai, right? I'll show the world it's
Tomako-time!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Oh... Did I mess up that joke?!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I had no idea Tarumae was planning on
going to Dubai!
choice_data_list: Yeah. She's really going all out.
Yeah. She's really going all out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The international dirt G1 in Dubai is one of the
most prestigious races in the entire world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's incredibly difficult to put on a good
performance there. But Hokko Tarumae has
decided to go anyway...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. I want to talk to Tarumae. Is that
okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For whatever reason, Copano Rickey looks very
serious as we head over to see Hokko Tarumae.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Rickey. Did the news surprise you? I've
actually been thinking about it for some time
now.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering what I needed to do to put
Tomakomai on the map, and I figured the only
way was to make waves on the world stage.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Imagine—if I win, everyone will know
Tomakomai's name.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: So you're doing this for Tomakomai...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
That's not the only reason, though. You're
actually another reason, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wait, I am?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. The February Stakes made me realize that
if I don't do something now, I probably won't be
able to keep winning against you.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
So I have to compete in an even bigger race and
become even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I can't let myself lose to you, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey falls silent. As a trainer, I'm
curious about a few aspects of Hokko Tarumae's
plan.
choice_data_list:
Do you have a backup plan? And have you
looked into the competition?

Do you have a backup plan? And have you
looked into the competition?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: A backup... plan? ...Competition?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racing overseas isn't something you can succeed
at with willpower alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Careful planning is required, and it's important to
determine whether a runner is suited to travel in
the first place. When I ask her about these
things...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I have some backup ideas, but I'm not sure how
well I'll hold up against the other racers.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I had a pretty comfortable upbringing in the
countryside, so I'm not great when it comes to
unfamiliar places.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae! In that case...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
But I'll be fine! My love for my hometown can
overcome any hurdle!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Besides... this is partially about getting revenge
for what happened to Falco.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Once before, she competed in the same race I'll
be running in. But when she did...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
She got completely surrounded at the very start,
and couldn't break away like she normally does.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
When I saw on TV how sad she was that she
couldn't showcase her full strength... I just
couldn't stop crying...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I really look up to her as an Umadol, and now
that I'm stronger, I want to run my best to make
up for all her frustration!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I think I can handle it! No... I know I can!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Just watch, Rickey! This spring, I'm gonna work
even harder'n you, and put a great big gap
between us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shhhooommm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Hokko Tarumae leaves for Dubai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for the big race, and we have no
real idea how things are going in Dubai...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae hasn't been updating her Umastagram at
all lately...
choice_data_list: She's probably busy preparing for the race.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I hope that's all it is... but I can't shake the feeling
there's more to it. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: She's Tomakomai's tourism ambassador.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No matter what happens, she never forgets to
promote her hometown...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...She makes a good point. Hokko Tarumae would
never waste such a great advertising opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I have a bad feeling about this...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should have told her. I know she wouldn't
have believed me, but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Her trip was in the Five Ghosts direction.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's the second most dangerous and unlucky
direction, second only to the one signifying total
loss.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The night I learned that Tarumae was going
overseas...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae won't believe me, no matter what I say.
But...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No. I'll hold off for now. If things start to look
better, then I can tell her. Yeah! It's probably
wiser to wait and see how things pan out!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But maybe things would be better now if I'd told
her what I knew... Unless...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Was keeping it to myself the right thing to do?
Maybe we'll all be able to laugh about this after
the race is over, right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what to say. Until now, Rickey's feng
shui readings have almost always been accurate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, on the day of the race...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: In sixteenth place, Hokko Tarumae!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Last place?! What happened? Truly a lackluster
performance!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
There have also been reports that the water there
doesn't quite agree with her.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae... Tarumae!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae suffers a major defeat and
returns to Japan in shambles. And that's not all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes on to announce that she'll be taking a
break from racing. Copano Rickey's most
important rival is now out of the picture.
